title: Schwarzschild Metric Killing Vectors Proof
desc: Demonstrates that δᵐᵤ_t and δᵐᵤ_φ are Killing vectors using Christoffel symbols.

title: Advanced LIGO Noise Sources Explained
desc: Analyzes quantum, thermal, and technical noise components in gravitational wave detectors.

title: Statistical Mechanics Homework: Normalization and Particle Classification
desc: Normalizing a probability distribution and classifying particles as bosons or fermions.

title: Advanced Calculus: Taylor's Theorem Review
desc: Explores Taylor's Theorem with Peano, Lagrange, and Cauchy remainder forms for function approximation.

title: Advanced Calculus Series Convergence Analysis
desc: Analyzing convergence of six complex series using comparison, ratio, and root tests.

title: Advanced Calculus Surface and Curve Integrals
desc: Solutions for surface integrals, Stokes' theorem, and complex line integrals in multivariable calculus.

title: Power Series Convergence and Summation Formulas
desc: Analyzing convergence domains and proving summation formulas for power series like ln(1+x) and arctan(x).

title: Advanced Calculus: Metrics and Inequalities
desc: Proving metric properties and Cauchy-Schwarz inequality in function spaces.

title: Advanced Calculus: Existence of Extrema
desc: Proving continuous functions attain minima and maxima on specific sets in ℝ².

title: Advanced Calculus Partial Derivative Exercises
desc: A set of partial derivative problems with solutions, covering chain rule applications.

title: Implicit Function Theorem Application in Calculus
desc: Analyzing a cubic equation to prove implicit function existence and compute derivatives.

title: Advanced Calculus Critical Points Analysis
desc: Finding and classifying critical points of multivariable functions using partial derivatives.

title: Advanced Calculus Integration Problems
desc: Three multivariable integration problems solved using coordinate transformations.

title: Advanced Calculus: Surface Area and Centroids
desc: Calculating surface areas and centroids for ellipsoids, spheres, and tori using double integrals.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Proofs and Trigonometric Identities
desc: A complex analysis assignment proving a modulus identity and deriving trigonometric formulas.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Residue Theorem Applications
desc: Solving integrals using the residue theorem with detailed step-by-step calculations.

title: Complex Analysis: Residue Theorem Applications
desc: Using residue theorem to evaluate improper integrals with branch cuts and poles.

title: Complex Functions Homework: Trigonometric Identities
desc: Proving complex sine/cosine addition formulas and hyperbolic identities using Euler's formula.

title: Analyzing Multivalued Functions and Branch Points
desc: A technical analysis of branch points and values for complex functions like sqrt(1-z^3).

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Contour Integrals
desc: Solutions for complex contour integrals and Poisson formula proofs.

title: Complex Analysis Homework on Series Convergence
desc: Analyzing convergence of positive and complex series with counterexamples.

title: Complex Analysis Homework: Series Convergence
desc: Analyzing convergence radii and sum functions in complex power series problems.

title: Complex Analysis: Taylor Series Expansions
desc: Taylor series expansions for secant, logarithmic, and square root functions in complex analysis.

title: Complex Analysis: Laurent Series Expansions
desc: Detailed Laurent expansions for rational and logarithmic functions in complex analysis.

title: Complex Analysis Homework on Analytic Continuation
desc: Proofs for analytic continuation, series convergence, and function singularities in complex analysis.

title: Spherical Harmonics Expansion and PDE Solutions
desc: Expanding functions in spherical harmonics and solving Poisson equations with boundary conditions.

title: Math Physics Equations Homework Solutions
desc: Integral calculations and Bessel function identities in mathematical physics.

title: Critical Radius Calculations for Nuclear Reactors
desc: Deriving critical radii for cylindrical and spherical uranium blocks using diffusion equations.

title: Delta Function Properties and Coordinate Transformations
desc: Proofs of delta function identities in 1D, 3D, and coordinate systems.

title: Solving Forced Vibration with Laplace Transforms
desc: A step-by-step solution to a damped oscillator driven by a harmonic force using Laplace transforms.
